name: Pump Radar Live
description: Momentum scanner for volume, social, liquidity, and price acceleration signals with no coordination or manipulation behavior.
degenPitch: Catch acceleration signals without turning the room into a coordination mess.
whatItDoes: Monitors volume, social, price, and liquidity acceleration.
Emits paid signal alerts with receipt trails.
Creates optional user-confirmed intents after risk rules pass.
cursorPrompt: Build a Pump Radar Live momentum scanner with DNA x402. Monitor acceleration signals, sell receipt-gated alerts, avoid coordination/manipulation wording, and require client-side signing for optional live intents.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Pump Radar Live momentum scanner with DNA x402. Monitor acceleration signals, sell receipt-gated alerts, avoid coordination/manipulation wording, and require client-side signing for optional live intents.
exampleFlow: Optional user-confirmed trade intent is created
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds alert ID and signal digest.
